## Description

Short summary of the change.

Examples:
- Added entity CRUD filtering
- Implemented source asset provenance endpoint
- Fixed ingestion validator bug

## Testing

- [ ] pytest
- [ ] ruff check .
- [ ] pre-commit run --all-files

Additional manual testing notes:

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated where appropriate
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
- [ ] CI passes

## Screenshots / Examples

Include sample API responses or UI screenshots if helpful.
